Looking at this forecast, the National Weather Service is predicting a high of 84°F for Miami today. The hourly forecast shows temperatures peaking at 83°F around 2-3pm, with the official forecast high at 84°F.

This is a same-day forecast with only hours remaining until resolution. Same-day weather forecasts from NWS are extremely accurate - typically within 1-2°F of the actual high temperature over 90% of the time.
